title: Settings
subtitle: Company profile, billing, and platform preferences.

security.title: Security & Data Ownership
security.subtitle: Understand what Aipify accesses, what is stored, and how permissions work.

updates.title: Software Updates
updates.subtitle: Your current Aipify version, scheduled maintenance, and update history.
updates.reassurance: Nothing is required from you. Aipify will continue monitoring after the update.

domains.title: Domains & Installations
domains.subtitle: Manage approved domains and monitor plan limits for your websites.
domains.limitReached: You have reached your domain limit. Upgrade your plan to add more websites.
domains.verificationPlaceholder: Domain verification (DNS, meta tag, or install token) will be available in a future release.
